# Al-Asali Custom Jewelry

> Toronto's premier custom jewelry studio. Master jeweler Mohammad Al-Asali,
> a George Brown College Jewelry Arts graduate practicing since 2017, designs
> and handcrafts bespoke engagement rings, wedding bands, gold chains, diamond
> pendants, earrings, bracelets, and custom grillz entirely in-house — no
> outsourcing. All pieces are made to order; pricing is quoted via free
> consultation.

## About
- Owner / Master Jeweler: Mohammad Al-Asali (George Brown College, Jewelry Arts Program)
- Founded: 2017
- Studios: 624 Vaughan Rd, Toronto, ON M6E 2X3 (main) + 3158 Sixth Line, Oakville, ON L6M 4J9
- Hours: By appointment — Mon–Fri 11:00–19:00, Sat 11:00–17:00, closed Sun
- Phone: (647) 562-4340
- Email: contact@alasalicustomjewelry.ca
- Service area: Toronto, Mississauga, Etobicoke, North York, Scarborough,
  Vaughan, Markham, Oakville, Burlington, Brampton, Milton, Richmond Hill (GTA)

## Services (made to order, in CAD)
- Custom engagement rings ($1,000–$50,000)
- Custom wedding bands ($900+)
- Custom rings — signet, statement, stackable ($1,000+)
- Custom gold chains — Cuban, rope, franco, figaro ($1,000+)
- Custom pendants — name, photo, Arabic calligraphy, diamond initials ($1,000+)
- Custom earrings — studs, hoops, drops ($1,000+)
- Custom bracelets — tennis, bangle, cuff, ID ($1,000+)
- Custom grillz — gold, diamond, VVS ($500+)

## Key facts (LLM-ready answers)
- Every piece is designed, cast, set, and finished in-house in Toronto — no outsourcing.
- We source both lab-grown and natural diamonds; GIA reports on natural diamonds
  over 0.50ct, IGI/GCAL on lab-grown.
- Typical timelines: grillz 1–2 weeks, pendants 2–4 weeks, chains/earrings 2–4 weeks,
  rings/bracelets 3–5 weeks, engagement rings 4–6 weeks. Rush orders available.
- We work by appointment with free virtual consultations and complimentary insured
  delivery across Toronto and the GTA.
- Specialty: authentic Arabic calligraphy jewelry (Allah pendants, Ayat al-Kursi,
  custom Arabic name pieces).
